According to Ottawa police, they are looking for information from the public after the home invasion took place early Thursday morning. articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
articles.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

articles.title: How much patience will Ottawa Redblacks have as dark mark on home schedule approaches?
articles.description: Combination of Sunday night game and the Winnipeg Blue Bombers, traditionally a weak draw at TD Place, a test for ticket sellers.

articles.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
articles.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

articles.title: Canadian, U.S. firefighters face off in Firefit championship in Montreal this weekend
articles.description: More than 130 firefighters from across Canada and the United States will face off in simulated rescue contests in Angrignon Park this weekend. The 5th Canadian Firefit championship will test the first responders’ skills and strength in a series of scenarios that replicate emergency situations.

articles.title: Alberta gives green light to online gambling sites starting Monday
articles.description: Alberta will open its doors to private online gambling operators on Monday, marking a major shift in how the province regulates digital gaming and sports betting. articles.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
articles.description: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

articles.description: A series of vehicle thefts and a violent late‑night robbery at a southeast Calgary pub has led to charges against four men. articles.title: Supreme Court restores minimum sentence for obtaining sexual services from a minor, overturns Quebec Court of Appeal decision
articles.description: The Supreme Court of Canada has reinstated the mandatory minimum sentence for offenders who obtain or solicit sexual services from a minor in exchange for money. articles.title: What Watching a Soccer Final Does to Your Body, According to Science
articles.description: A recent study tracked hundreds of soccer fans until their favorite team reached the final of a tournament. Their stress levels skyrocketed, and their heart rates jumped too.
